title: businesses with ugly AI menu redesigns!!!
excerpt: I like supporting local businesses but it's so disheartening to see the increasing use of genAI in their branding/marketing/etc. Yuck yuck YUCK!!!
content_html:
fiddery

Home Archive Tags Now Links Guestbook

20 Jul, 2026

I stopped by a Filipino/Hawaiian (mostly filipino) restaurant/bar that was recommended to me a few months ago by someone I met at an AANHPI event. One of my friends that was eating with us had gone many times before and said they enjoyed the menu.

We looked up the menu before heading over.

As a Filipino-American I always get curious about Filipino restaurants because a lot of our dishes are family-style/comfort food, so it’s always interesting to see what foods will be on the menu.

To our disappointment (did I mention the friend group I was eating with are my artist friends and we had just gone to a doodle date meetup?) the restaurant revamped their menu with AI. NO!

So ill. I hate it. Uncanny. UGH.

The worst part is that I frequently work with small businesses in Austin and know that this is from a place of complete ignorance rather than feeling a sense of ownership in art/design they did not do.

People see button. They press.

NO!!!

The disturbing uncanny-like look of all these plates are so… bad. I’m sorry to subject you, the reader, to such slop.

I was thinking about ordering the adobo plate before I got to the restaurant and then pivoted to spamsilog instead (lmao I was craving comfort food). The plate was only $10. I could make this at home but often don’t have the patience to get the spam really crispy (also I get to lazy so make sinangan/garlic rice)… and also I use the low sodium spam at home.

Ugly AI pic of the plate vs the real plate.

Disturbing AI aside this tasted just like waking up at home and my mom cooking spam for breakfast.

This is extremely conflicting because I love to support/shop small and local businesses and I’ve seen more and more of them use genAI in their signage. Yes I also understand many of them have slim margins, but TBH I would rather read a whole menu in Comic Sans, Papyrus, or Curlz MT than this garbage.

#food #life

content_html_zh:
小提琴

主页 存档 标签 现在链接 留言簿

20 Jul, 2026

我去了一家菲律宾/夏威夷（主要是菲律宾人）餐厅/酒吧，几个月前我在 AANHPI 活动中遇到的一个人向我推荐了这家餐厅/酒吧。 我的一位和我们一起吃饭的朋友之前已经去过很多次了，他说他们很喜欢这里的菜单。

我们在前往之前查看了菜单。

作为一名菲律宾裔美国人，我总是对菲律宾餐馆感到好奇，因为我们的很多菜肴都是家庭式/休闲食品，所以看看菜单上有什么食物总是很有趣。

令我们失望的是（我有没有提到和我一起吃饭的朋友圈是我的艺术家朋友，我们刚刚参加了一次涂鸦约会聚会？） 该餐厅利用人工智能改进了菜单。 不！

病得很厉害。 我恨它。 不可思议。 啊。

最糟糕的是，我经常与奥斯汀的小企业合作，并且知道这是来自完全无知的地方，而不是对他们没有做过的艺术/设计感到主人翁意识。

人们看到按钮。 他们施压。

NO!!!

所有这些盘子的令人不安的不可思议的外观是如此…… 坏的。 我很抱歉让你，读者，遭受这样的侮辱。

我想在到达餐厅之前点一份 adobo 盘，然后转而点 spamsilog （我很想吃舒适的食物）。 盘子才10美元。 我可以在家里做这个，但通常没有耐心把垃圾邮件弄得很脆（而且我也很懒，所以做锡南甘/大蒜米饭）…… 我也在家里使用低钠垃圾邮件。

盘子的丑陋人工智能图片与真实盘子的对比。

撇开令人不安的人工智能不谈，这尝起来就像在家里醒来，我妈妈在做垃圾邮件作为早餐。

这是非常矛盾的，因为我喜欢支持/购买小型和本地企业，而且我看到越来越多的企业在标牌中使用 genAI。 是的，我也知道其中许多利润微薄，但说实话，我宁愿阅读 Comic Sans、Papyrus 或 Curlz MT 的整个菜单，也不愿阅读这些垃圾。
